hourly_summary: 本小时共收录 105 条：AI 40 条、策略交易 10 条、加密货币 25 条、世界事件 20 条、财经 10 条。重点关注：【CRYPTO】欧洲央行警告欧盟财长放宽欧元稳定币规则将削弱银行实力：路透；【FINANCE】凯文·沃什真正的美联储“政权更迭”可能发生在华尔街的管道深处；【FINANCE】尽管法律环境不明朗，但企业并没有被吓倒在预测市场投资。

items.title: ECB warns EU finance ministers that easing euro stablecoin rules would weaken banks: Reuters
items.summary: ECB President Christine Lagarde warned the changes would destabilize bank funding and weaken interest-rate transmission.
items.title_zh: 欧洲央行警告欧盟财长放宽欧元稳定币规则将削弱银行实力：路透
items.summary_zh: 欧洲央行行长克里斯蒂娜·拉加德警告称，这些变化将破坏银行融资的稳定并削弱利率传导。

items.title: Kevin Warsh's real Fed 'regime change' may happen deep inside Wall Street's plumbing
items.summary: Warsh could guide to a smaller role in day-to-day markets, while also setting clearer rules for how and when it should intervene.
items.title_zh: 凯文·沃什真正的美联储“政权更迭”可能发生在华尔街的管道深处
items.summary_zh: 沃什可以引导其在日常市场中发挥较小的作用，同时就如何以及何时进行干预制定更明确的规则。

items.title: Despite murky legal landscape, companies are undeterred in their prediction market investments
items.summary: Companies reiterated plans to growing their prediction markets businesses in recent earnings calls even as a regulatory debate continues.
items.title_zh: 尽管法律环境不明朗，但企业并没有被吓倒在预测市场投资
items.summary_zh: 尽管监管争论仍在继续，但公司在最近的财报电话会议上重申了发展预测市场业务的计划。

items.title: Prediction markets are fueling a high-stakes brawl between states and federal regulators
items.summary: Sixteen states are in legal proceedings against prediction market platforms, while one state has moved to ban them.
items.title_zh: 预测市场正在加剧各州和联邦监管机构之间的高风险争吵
items.summary_zh: 十六个州正在对预测市场平台提起法律诉讼，而一个州已采取行动禁止它们。

items.title: Iran War Live Updates: U.S. and Iran Signal Move Toward Initial Peace Deal, but Details Remain Murky
items.summary: President Trump said the United States and Iran had “largely negotiated” an agreement, even as American and Iranian officials described the terms differently.
items.title_zh: 伊朗战争实时更新：美国和伊朗暗示将达成初步和平协议，但细节仍不明朗
items.summary_zh: 特朗普总统表示，美国和伊朗“基本上已经通过谈判”达成协议，尽管美国和伊朗官员对条款的描述不同。

items.title: Bitcoin is ready to beat stocks and bonds again after underperformance against Wall Street
items.summary: Former Credit Suisse global head of portfolio and Risk Dimensions CIO Mark Connors says bitcoin has broken out of its longest stretch of underperformance in history and is ready to beat stocks, bonds, and gold as inflation stubbornly sticks around.
items.title_zh: 在对华尔街表现不佳后，比特币已准备好再次击败股票和债券
items.summary_zh: 瑞士信贷前全球投资组合主管和Risk Dimensions首席信息官马克·康纳斯(Mark Connors)表示，比特币已经摆脱了历史上最长的表现不佳时期，并且随着通胀顽固地存在，比特币已经准备好击败股票、债券和黄金。

items.title: Clarity Act could spark a boom in crypto ‘yield-as-a-service’
items.summary: The bill’s restrictions on yield-bearing crypto products may push the industry away from passive "hold-to-earn" models and toward AI-driven, compliant yield infrastructure, according to STBL Chief Commercial Officer Joe Vollono.
items.title_zh: 澄清法案可能引发加密货币“收益即服务”的繁荣
items.summary_zh: STBL 首席商务官 Joe Vollono 表示，该法案对产生收益的加密产品的限制可能会促使该行业摆脱被动的“持有赚取”模式，转向人工智能驱动的合规收益基础设施。

items.title: Bitcoin tanks to $74,300 as spot ETFs bleed $2.26 billion in two weeks
items.summary: U.S.-listed spot bitcoin exchange-traded funds have seen more than $2.26 billion in outflows over the past two weeks.
items.title_zh: 现货 ETF 两周内蒸发 22.6 亿美元，比特币跌至 74,300 美元
items.summary_zh: 过去两周，美国上市的现货比特币交易所交易基金资金流出超过 22.6 亿美元。

items.title: F2Pool founder who controls 11% of bitcoin's hashrate to lead first SpaceX mission to Mars
items.summary: Chun Wang, the first Mission Commander for SpaceX’s first commercial spaceflight to Mars, is crucial for the future transport of millions of tons of cargo and a million citizens to the Red Planet.
items.title_zh: F2Pool创始人控制着11%的比特币算力，领导SpaceX首次火星任务
items.summary_zh: 王春是 SpaceX 首次火星商业航天飞行的首任任务指挥官，他对于未来向这颗红色星球运送数百万吨货物和 100 万公民至关重要。

items.title: Spot bitcoin ETFs shed $1.26 billion in worst week since late January as ether funds see 10-day outflow streak
items.summary: BlackRock's IBIT now holds $61.1 billion in net assets against $64.8 billion in cumulative inflows, a difference of roughly $3.7 billion.
items.title_zh: 以太坊基金连续 10 天流出，现货比特币 ETF 损失 12.6 亿美元，这是自 1 月底以来最糟糕的一周
items.summary_zh: 贝莱德的 IBIT 目前持有 611 亿美元的净资产，而累计流入额为 648 亿美元，相差约 37 亿美元。

items.title: New strategic bitcoin reserve bill drops 1 million BTC purchase target, adds 20-year lockup period
items.summary: The bill would require quarterly public proof-of-reserve disclosures and third-party audits of government bitcoin holdings.
items.title_zh: 新比特币战略储备法案下调100万枚比特币购买目标，增加20年锁定期
items.summary_zh: 该法案将要求每季度公开披露储备证明并对政府持有的比特币进行第三方审计。

items.title: Towards Speed-of-Light Text Generation with Nemotron-Labs Diffusion Language Models
items.title_zh: 使用 Nemotron-Labs 扩散语言模型实现光速文本生成

items.title: Surge in 'risk-free' treasury yields sends bond investors in search of better opportunities
items.summary: Treasury yield surge shows bond market is not 'risk free' after all, but there's opportunity for fixed-income investors in intermediates, BBBs and high yield.
items.title_zh: “无风险”国债收益率飙升促使债券投资者寻找更好的机会
items.summary_zh: 国债收益率飙升表明债券市场毕竟并非“无风险”，但中间品、BBB 和高收益债券的固定收益投资者仍有机会。

items.title: Miner Perpetua Resources secures $2.9 billion U.S. loan for Idaho gold, antimony project
items.summary: Mining company Perpetua Resources has secured a $2.9 billion loan from the U.S. Export-Import Bank as the U.S. looks to secure access to critical minerals.
items.title_zh: 矿业公司 Perpetua Resources 为爱达荷州黄金、锑项目获得 29 亿美元美国贷款
items.summary_zh: 由于美国希望获得关键矿产，矿业公司 Perpetua Resources 已从美国进出口银行获得 29 亿美元贷款。

items.title: Man killed in shark attack off Australia's north-east coast
items.summary: The 39-year-old was fatally injured while swimming out at a shoal off the Cassowary Coast in Queensland.
items.title_zh: 男子在澳大利亚东北海岸附近的鲨鱼袭击中丧生
items.summary_zh: 这名39岁的男子在昆士兰州食火鸡海岸附近的浅滩游泳时受重伤身亡。

items.title: California declares emergency as fire crews race to contain toxic leak
items.summary: Thousands have been evacuated as officials warn a tank containing about 7,000 gallons of methyl methacrylate could explode.
items.title_zh: 加州宣布进入紧急状态，消防人员竞相控制有毒物质泄漏
items.summary_zh: 由于官员警告称，一个装有约 7,000 加仑甲基丙烯酸甲酯的储罐可能会爆炸，数千人已被疏散。

items.title: French mum and partner held until trial after sons abandoned by road in Portugal
items.summary: The couple, who allegedly left the woman's sons on a roadside in southern Portugal, will remain in custody.
items.title_zh: 法国妈妈和伴侣因儿子在葡萄牙被遗弃在公路上而被拘留直至审判
items.summary_zh: 据称，这对夫妇将这名妇女的儿子留在葡萄牙南部的路边，目前仍将被拘留。

items.title: Do U.S. Automakers Have a Future in Canada?
items.summary: Detroit-based automakers pioneered open trade between Canada and the United States, benefiting both countries. President Trump’s trade war now leaves their future in the country in question.
items.title_zh: 美国汽车制造商在加拿大有未来吗？
items.summary_zh: 总部位于底特律的汽车制造商开创了加拿大和美国之间的开放贸易，使两国受益。特朗普总统的贸易战现在让他们在该国的未来受到质疑。

items.title: France Bans Israeli Minister Over Treatment of Detained Flotilla Activists
items.summary: Itamar Ben-Gvir, the Israeli national security minister, has long drawn criticism for his hard-line statements and harsh policies against Palestinian prisoners.
items.title_zh: 法国因对待被拘留的船队活动分子而禁止以色列部长出任
items.summary_zh: 以色列国家安全部长伊塔马尔·本-格维尔长期以来因其强硬言论和针对巴勒斯坦囚犯的严厉政策而受到批评。

items.title: Crypto trader sees Hyperliquid, AI tokens leading next altcoin rally
items.summary: Hyperliquid’s surge and renewed interest in AI-focused crypto projects are signaling a broader return of risk appetite in altcoins, says Michael van de Poppe.
items.title_zh: 加密货币交易员认为 Hyperliquid、AI 代币引领下一次山寨币反弹
items.summary_zh: Michael van de Poppe 表示，Hyperliquid 的激增以及人们对以人工智能为中心的加密项目重新产生的兴趣，标志着山寨币风险偏好的更广泛回归。

items.title: Why Minnesota is empowering local banks to fight Wall Street for crypto revenue
items.summary: A local banker told CoinDesk that in light of Wall Street’s aggressive push into the crypto industry, Minnesota's financial institutions could not afford to remain on the sidelines.
items.title_zh: 为什么明尼苏达州授权当地银行与华尔街争夺加密货币收入
items.summary_zh: 一位当地银行家告诉 CoinDesk，鉴于华尔街大举进军加密货币行业，明尼苏达州的金融机构不能继续袖手旁观。

items.title: FTX’s former law firm, auditor agree to pay $66 million to settle customer claims over fraud
items.summary: The law firm, Fenwick & West, denied wrongdoing and still faces a separate $525 million suit in Washington that is not covered by Friday's deal.
items.title_zh: FTX 前律师事务所、审计师同意支付 6600 万美元以解决客户欺诈索赔
items.summary_zh: 泛伟律师事务所 (Fenwick & West) 否认有不当行为，但仍面临华盛顿另一项价值 5.25 亿美元的诉讼，该诉讼不在周五协议的涵盖范围内。

items.title: Kalshi, Polymarket lose bids to halt Nevada and Washington gambling cases
items.summary: The Ninth Circuit said federal derivatives oversight does not shield prediction market firms from state gaming enforcement.
items.title_zh: 卡尔希 (Kalshi) 和 Polymarket 未能阻止内华达州和华盛顿州的赌博案件
items.summary_zh: 第九巡回法院表示，联邦衍生品监管并不能保护预测市场公司免受州博彩执法的影响。

items.summary: CoinGecko trending rank #11.
items.title_zh: 加密货币趋势：Hyperliquid (HYPE)
items.summary_zh: CoinGecko 趋势排名第 11。

items.summary_zh: CoinGecko 趋势排名第 95。

items.summary: CoinGecko trending rank #35.

items.summary_zh: CoinGecko 趋势排名第 35 位。

items.summary_zh: CoinGecko 趋势排名第 178 位。

items.title: How Ramp engineers accelerate code review with Codex
items.summary: How Ramp engineers use Codex with GPT-5.5 to review code and ship improvements, allowing them to get substantive feedback in minutes instead of hours.
items.title_zh: Ramp 工程师如何使用 Codex 加速代码审查
items.summary_zh: Ramp 工程师如何使用 Codex 和 GPT-5.5 来审查代码并发布改进，使他们能够在几分钟而不是几小时内获得实质性反馈。

items.title: Introducing OpenAI for Singapore
items.summary: OpenAI for Singapore launches a multi-year AI partnership to expand deployment, build local talent, and support businesses and public services with AI.
items.title_zh: 为新加坡推出 OpenAI
items.summary_zh: OpenAI for Singapore 启动了一项多年的人工智能合作伙伴关系，以扩大部署、培养本地人才，并通过人工智能支持企业和公共服务。

items.title: Advancing content provenance for a safer, more transparent AI ecosystem
items.summary: OpenAI advances AI content provenance with Content Credentials, SynthID, and a verification tool to help people identify and trust AI-generated media.
items.title_zh: 推进内容来源，打造更安全、更透明的人工智能生态系统
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 通过内容凭证、SynthID 和验证工具推进 AI 内容来源，帮助人们识别和信任 AI 生成的媒体。

items.title: Specialization Beats Scale: A Strategic Variable Most AI Procurement Decisions Overlook
items.title_zh: 专业化战胜规模：大多数人工智能采购决策忽视的战略变量

items.title: Technology usually creates jobs for young, skilled workers. Will AI do the same?
items.summary: A new study of the postwar U.S. shows which kinds of workers historically filled new tech-enabled jobs.
items.title_zh: 技术通常会为年轻的技术工人创造就业机会。人工智能也会这么做吗？
items.summary_zh: 一项针对战后美国的新研究显示了历史上哪些类型的工人担任了新技术支持的工作。

items.title: Games people — and machines — play: Untangling strategic reasoning to advance AI
items.summary: Assistant Professor Gabriele Farina mines the foundations of decision-making in complex multi-agent scenarios.
items.title_zh: 人和机器玩的游戏：理清战略推理以推进人工智能
items.summary_zh: 助理教授 Gabriele Farina 挖掘复杂多智能体场景中决策的基础。

items.title: Bitcoin heads higher as President Trump announces Iran peace agreement
items.summary: "An Agreement has been largely negotiated, subject to finalization between the United States of America, the Islamic Republic of Iran, and the various other Countries," wrote President Trump late Saturday afternoon.
items.title_zh: 特朗普总统宣布伊朗和平协议，比特币走高
items.summary_zh: 特朗普总统周六下午晚些时候写道：“一项协议已基本通过谈判，有待美利坚合众国、伊朗伊斯兰共和国和其他国家之间最终敲定。”

items.title: Ripple, North Island Ventures back $6 million round for cross-chain platform Squid
items.summary: Squid is preparing to launch a new consumer product aimed at making it easier to access and manage crypto assets, Fig told The Block.
items.title_zh: Ripple 和 North Island Ventures 为跨链平台 Squid 提供 600 万美元融资
items.summary_zh: Fig 告诉 The Block，Squid 正准备推出一款新的消费产品，旨在让访问和管理加密资产变得更加容易。

items.title: An OpenAI model has disproved a central conjecture in discrete geometry
items.summary: An OpenAI model solved the 80-year-old unit distance problem, disproving a major conjecture in discrete geometry and marking a milestone in AI-driven mathematics.
items.title_zh: OpenAI 模型反驳了离散几何的中心猜想
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 模型解决了 80 年历史的单位距离问题，反驳了离散几何中的一个重大猜想，标志着人工智能驱动数学的里程碑。

items.title: The next phase of OpenAI’s Education for Countries
items.summary: OpenAI advances Education for Countries, expanding AI adoption in schools with new partnerships, teacher training, and tools to improve global learning outcomes.
items.title_zh: OpenAI 国家教育的下一阶段
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 推进国家教育，通过新的合作伙伴关系、教师培训和工具扩大人工智能在学校的采用，以改善全球学习成果。

items.title: OlmoEarth v1.1: A more efficient family of Earth observation models
items.title_zh: OlmoEarth v1.1：更高效的地球观测模型系列

items.title: Building Blocks for Foundation Model Training and Inference on AWS
items.title_zh: AWS 上的基础模型训练和推理的构建块

items.title: How AI Mode is changing the way people search in the U.S.
items.summary: One year after launch, see how AI Mode’s users are shifting from keywords to natural language queries.
items.title_zh: AI 模式如何改变美国人们的搜索方式
items.summary_zh: 发布一年后，看看 AI 模式的用户如何从关键字转向自然语言查询。

items.title: New ways to create and get things done in Google Workspace
items.summary: Announcing new voice capabilities in Gmail, Docs and Keep, a new design tool called Google Pics and updates to AI Inbox.
items.title_zh: 在 Google Workspace 中创建和完成工作的新方法
items.summary_zh: 宣布 Gmail、Docs 和 Keep 中的新语音功能、名为 Google Pics 的新设计工具以及 AI Inbox 的更新。

items.title: Gemini 3.5: frontier intelligence with action
items.summary: At Google I/O we released Gemini 3.5, our latest series of models combining frontier intelligence with action.
items.title_zh: Gemini 3.5：前沿情报与行动
items.summary_zh: 在 Google I/O 大会上，我们发布了 Gemini 3.5，这是我们将前沿智能与行动相结合的最新模型系列。

items.title: Building AI models that understand chemical principles
items.summary: Connor Coley works at the interface of chemistry and machine learning, to discover and design new drug compounds.
items.title_zh: 构建理解化学原理的人工智能模型
items.summary_zh: Connor Coley 致力于化学和机器学习的结合，发现和设计新的药物化合物。

items.title: Beacon Biosignals is mapping the brain during sleep
items.summary: Founded by Jake Donoghue PhD ’19 and former MIT researcher Jarrett Revels, the company is creating an AI-driven platform to help diagnose and treat disease.
items.title_zh: Beacon Biosignals 正在绘制睡眠期间的大脑图
items.summary_zh: 该公司由 Jake Donoghue 博士 '19 和前麻省理工学院研究员 Jarrett Revels 创立，正在创建一个人工智能驱动的平台来帮助诊断和治疗疾病。

items.title: Three signs from APEC that the U.S. and China remain far apart on trade
items.summary: U.S. and Chinese officials have met and spoken publicly about differing priorities since the Trump-Xi summit concluded in Beijing last week.
items.title_zh: APEC的三个迹象表明美国和中国在贸易上仍然存在很大分歧
items.summary_zh: 自特习会上周在北京结束以来，美国和中国官员多次会面并公开谈论不同的优先事项。

items.title: Which company will the U.S. government take a stake in next? Here’s what traders think
items.summary: After new stakes in quantum companies were revealed, traders on prediction market platform Kalshi think IonQ, Micron and Anduril could be next.
items.title_zh: 美国政府下一步将入股哪家公司？这是交易者的想法
items.summary_zh: 在量子公司的新股份公布后，预测市场平台 Kalshi 的交易员认为 IonQ、Micron 和 Anduril 可能是下一个。

items.title: U.S. pushes its AI in China and Asia after Trump-Xi meeting
items.summary: Integrating American AI in Asia is high on the agenda for the U.S., according to a senior official for APEC and economic policy.
items.title_zh: 特习会后美国将人工智能推向中国和亚洲
items.summary_zh: 一位负责亚太经合组织和经济政策的高级官员表示，将美国人工智能融入亚洲已成为美国议程的重要议题。

items.title: China calls for APEC cooperation as commerce minister skips opening over ‘urgent official business’
items.summary: China's international trade representative Li Chenggang said he was chairing Friday's meeting as Commerce Minister Wang Wentao had urgent matters to attend to.
items.title_zh: 中国呼吁亚太经合组织合作，商务部长因“紧急公务”缺席会议
items.summary_zh: 中国国际贸易代表李成钢表示，他正在主持周五的会议，因为商务部部长王文涛有紧急事务需要处理。

items.title: SpaceX, OpenAI valuations could mean they leapfrog Berkshire Hathaway on first day of trading
items.summary: Traders on prediction market Polymarket think SpaceX, OpenAI and Anthropic on their first day of trading will surpass valuations of at least $1.4 trillion.
items.title_zh: SpaceX 和 OpenAI 的估值可能意味着它们在交易首日就超越了伯克希尔哈撒韦公司
items.summary_zh: 预测市场 Polymarket 的交易员认为 SpaceX、OpenAI 和 Anthropic 在上市首日的估值将超过至少 1.4 万亿美元。

items.title: Suspect killed after opening fire on Secret Service near White House
items.summary: Officials say a suspect approached a checkpoint near the building and opened fire, and that a bystander was wounded.
items.title_zh: 嫌疑人在白宫附近向特勤局开枪身亡
items.summary_zh: 官员称，一名嫌疑人走近大楼附近的检查站并开枪，一名旁观者受伤。

items.title: Rosenberg: Luhansk strike sparks Russian accusations and vow to retaliate
items.summary: Eighteen people were killed and 42 others injured in the strike on the town in Russian-occupied eastern Ukraine.
items.title_zh: 罗森伯格：卢甘斯克罢工引发俄罗斯指控并誓言报复
items.summary_zh: 俄罗斯占领的乌克兰东部小镇遭到袭击，造成 18 人死亡、42 人受伤。

items.title: Large-scale Russian attack on Ukraine leaves four dead and dozens injured
items.summary: The Oreshnik missile, which reportedly travels over 10 times the speed of sound, was used, Russia has confirmed.
items.title_zh: 俄罗斯对乌克兰发动大规模袭击，造成四人死亡、数十人受伤
items.summary_zh: 俄罗斯证实使用了奥列什尼克导弹，据报道其飞行速度超过音速 10 倍。

items.title: Blast targeting train kills at least 20 in Pakistan
items.summary: Officials say the train had been transporting military personnel home for Eid when it was attacked by armed separatists.
items.title_zh: 巴基斯坦火车爆炸造成至少20人死亡
items.summary_zh: 官员们表示，这列火车在开斋节期间运送军事人员回家时遭到武装分裂分子的袭击。

items.title: At least 82 killed in Chinese coal mine explosion
items.summary: The blast in Shanxi province constitutes the country's worst mining disaster in 16 years.
items.title_zh: 中国煤矿爆炸至少82人死亡
items.summary_zh: 山西省的爆炸是该国16年来最严重的矿难。

items.title: Red Cross volunteers die from suspected Ebola in DR Congo
items.summary: They are thought to have caught the virus before the outbreak was identified, the Red Cross says.
items.title_zh: 刚果民主共和国红十字会志愿者死于疑似埃博拉病毒
items.summary_zh: 红十字会表示，他们被认为是在疫情爆发之前就感染了病毒。

items.title: F1 great Prost 'injured as masked gang raid home'
items.summary: Four-time Formula 1 world champion Alain Prost was injured when a masked gang raided his home near Geneva, Swiss media reports.
items.title_zh: F1伟大的普罗斯特“因蒙面团伙袭击回家而受伤”
items.summary_zh: 据瑞士媒体报道，四届一级方程式世界冠军阿兰·普罗斯特在蒙面团伙袭击他位于日内瓦附近的家时受伤。

items.title: How a Curious FIFA Deal Gave Fox a Huge Bargain for World Cup Broadcast Rights
items.summary: A decision to stave off litigation between Fox and FIFA turned into a bonanza worth hundreds of millions of dollars in discounted World Cup rights to the broadcaster.
items.title_zh: 国际足联的一项奇怪协议如何为福克斯赢得了世界杯转播权的巨额交易
items.summary_zh: 福克斯和国际足联之间避免诉讼的决定为该广播公司带来了价值数亿美元的世界杯折扣转播权的巨额财富。

items.title: Can Concrete Molds Revive Coral Reefs Ruined by Bombs and Climate Change?
items.summary: In a devastated section of the Coral Triangle in the Pacific Ocean, a conservation group is trying to build an artificial reef.
items.title_zh: 混凝土模具能否恢复被炸弹和气候变化破坏的珊瑚礁？
items.summary_zh: 在太平洋珊瑚三角区的一个被毁坏的区域，一个保护组织正在尝试建造一个人工鱼礁。

items.title: Iranian Officials Say Proposed Peace Deal Would Open Strait of Hormuz
items.summary: Iran has not formally responded to President Trump’s announcement that a peace deal was close. But officials suggested the oil choke point in the Strait of Hormuz could reopen.
items.title_zh: 伊朗官员表示拟议的和平协议将开放霍尔木兹海峡
items.summary_zh: 伊朗尚未对特朗普总统宣布即将达成和平协议做出正式回应。但官员们表示，霍尔木兹海峡的石油瓶颈可能会重新开放。

items.title: Britain Preparing for Mission That Could Clear Strait of Hormuz
items.summary: At Gibraltar, at the tip of Spain, British forces are ready to deploy autonomous mine-hunting equipment if a peace agreement is achieved.
items.title_zh: 英国准备执行清除霍尔木兹海峡的任务
items.summary_zh: 在西班牙最南端的直布罗陀，如果达成和平协议，英国军队准备部署自主扫雷设备。

items.title: A Lull in Fighting Gave Time to Bury Their Dead
items.summary: In the relative calm of the early days of a cease-fire, there were heart-rending scenes as people exhumed their loved ones from temporary graves and reburied them.
items.title_zh: 战斗的平静给了埋葬死者的时间
items.summary_zh: 在停火初期相对平静的日子里，当人们从临时坟墓中挖出亲人并重新埋葬时，出现了令人心碎的场景。

items.title: Xi Calls for All-Out Rescue After Coal Mine Explosion Kills at Least 82 in China
items.summary: The Chinese leader, Xi Jinping, called for an investigation and emphasized the need to “hold those responsible to account.”
items.title_zh: 中国煤矿爆炸造成至少82人死亡 习近平呼吁全力救援
items.summary_zh: 中国领导人习近平呼吁进行调查，并强调需要“追究责任人的责任”。

items.title: Their Phones Were Stolen in London. Then the Threats Started.
items.summary: Tens of thousands of smartphones were reported stolen in the British capital in recent years. For some victims, losing their phone was only the beginning.
items.title_zh: 他们的手机在伦敦被盗。然后威胁就开始了。
items.summary_zh: 据报道，近年来英国首都有数万部智能手机被盗。对于一些受害者来说，丢失手机只是一个开始。

items.title: Robinhood Crypto COO Tanya Denisova is leaving company amid revenue slowdown
items.summary: Robinhood Crypto COO Tanya Denisova is leaving the firm after more than five years, as the trading platform navigates a sharp decline in crypto revenue and works to lessen its dependence on digital asset market cycles.
items.title_zh: Robinhood Crypto 首席运营官 Tanya Denisova 因收入放缓而离开公司
items.summary_zh: Robinhood Crypto 首席运营官 Tanya Denisova 在五年多后离开公司，该交易平台正在应对加密货币收入急剧下降的情况，并努力减少对数字资产市场周期的依赖。

items.title: SEC Commissioner Peirce counters views that crypto rule will foster synthetic tokens
items.summary: Hester Peirce, the commissioner behind the SEC's Crypto Task Force, made statements on the now-delayed proposal, perhaps tamping down mistaken beliefs.
items.title_zh: 美国证券交易委员会委员 Peirce 反驳了加密货币规则将促进合成代币的观点
items.summary_zh: 美国证券交易委员会加密货币工作组背后的专员 Hester Peirce 就现已推迟的提案发表了声明，或许是为了消除错误的看法。

items.title: Tom Emmer brushes off law enforcement concerns over Clarity Act
items.summary: House Majority Whip Tom Emmer said concerns from law enforcement groups about crypto developer protections are being overstated.
items.title_zh: 汤姆·埃默（Tom Emmer）不理会执法部门对《澄清法案》的担忧
items.summary_zh: 众议院多数党党鞭汤姆·埃默 (Tom Emmer) 表示，执法机构对加密货币开发商保护的担忧被夸大了。

items.title: SEC delays tokenized asset exemption amid concerns over third-party tokens: Bloomberg Law
items.summary: The SEC has delayed its plan for an anticipated exemption that would clarify the agency's stance on tokenized assets, Bloomberg Law reported.
items.title_zh: 由于对第三方代币的担忧，美国证券交易委员会推迟了代币化资产豁免：彭博法
items.summary_zh: 据彭博社报道，美国证券交易委员会推迟了预期的豁免计划，该计划将澄清该机构对代币化资产的立场。

items.title: NEAR token jumps 30% amid AI hype, Arthur Hayes endorsement and scaling plans
items.summary: The prominent crypto investor Arthur Hayes described NEAR, HYPE and ZEC as “the holy trinity” of altcoins.
items.title_zh: 在人工智能炒作、Arthur Hayes 的认可和扩展计划的推动下，NEAR 代币上涨了 30%
items.summary_zh: 著名的加密货币投资者 Arthur Hayes 将 NEAR、HYPE 和 ZEC 描述为山寨币的“神圣三位一体”。

items.title: OKX, ICE partner on oil perps as NYSE-parent pressures US regulators to rein in Hyperliquid
items.summary: OKX's oil perps contracts will track Intercontinental Exchange's Brent Crude and WTI Crude energy benchmarks.
items.title_zh: OKX 与 ICE 就石油永续业务展开合作，纽约证券交易所母公司向美国监管机构施压，要求其控制 Hyperliquid
items.summary_zh: OKX 的石油永续合约将追踪洲际交易所的布伦特原油和 WTI 原油能源基准。

items.title: Kalshi-backed prediction market advocacy group debuts with support from former Trump aide
items.summary: An advocacy group focused on prediction markets has emerged with support from former White House Deputy Chief of Staff Taylor Budowich.
items.title_zh: 卡尔什支持的预测市场倡导组织在前特朗普助手的支持下首次亮相
items.summary_zh: 在前白宫副幕僚长泰勒·布多维奇的支持下，一个专注于预测市场的倡导组织已经成立。

items.title: OpenAI named a Leader in enterprise coding agents by Gartner
items.summary: OpenAI is named a leader in the 2026 Gartner Magic Quadrant for Enterprise AI Coding Agents, with Codex recognized for innovation and enterprise-scale deployment.
items.title_zh: OpenAI 被 Gartner 评为企业编码代理领域的领导者
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 在 2026 年 Gartner 企业 AI 编码代理魔力象限中被评为领导者，Codex 因创新和企业规模部署而获得认可。

items.title: How Virgin Atlantic ships faster with Codex
items.summary: How Virgin Atlantic used Codex to ship its revamped mobile app on a fixed holiday travel deadline, reaching near-total unit test coverage and zero P1 defects.
items.title_zh: 维珍航空如何利用 Codex 加快运输速度
items.summary_zh: 维珍航空如何使用 Codex 在固定的假日旅行截止日期内发布其改进的移动应用程序，实现接近全部单元测试覆盖率和零 P1 缺陷。

items.title: AdventHealth advances whole-person care with OpenAI
items.summary: AdventHealth is using ChatGPT for Healthcare to streamline workflows, reduce administrative burden, and return more time to patient care.
items.title_zh: AdventHealth 利用 OpenAI 推进全人护理
items.summary_zh: AdventHealth 正在使用 ChatGPT for Healthcare 来简化工作流程、减轻管理负担，并将更多时间用于患者护理。

items.title: OpenAI and Dell partner to bring Codex to hybrid and on-premise enterprise environments
items.summary: OpenAI and Dell partner to bring Codex to hybrid and on-premise environments, helping enterprises deploy AI coding agents securely across data and workflows.
items.title_zh: OpenAI 和戴尔合作将 Codex 引入混合和本地企业环境
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 和戴尔合作将 Codex 引入混合和本地环境，帮助企业跨数据和工作流程安全地部署 AI 编码代理。

items.title: OpenAI and Malta partner to bring ChatGPT Plus to all citizens
items.summary: OpenAI and Malta partner to expand AI access, offering ChatGPT Plus and training to help citizens build practical AI skills and use AI responsibly.
items.title_zh: OpenAI 和马耳他合作为所有公民带来 ChatGPT Plus
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 和马耳他合作扩大人工智能的使用范围，提供 ChatGPT Plus 和培训，帮助公民培养实用的人工智能技能并负责任地使用人工智能。

items.title: Introducing the Ettin Reranker Family
items.title_zh: Ettin Reranker 系列简介

items.title: PaddleOCR 3.5: Running OCR and Document Parsing Tasks with a Transformers Backend
items.title_zh: PaddleOCR 3.5：使用 Transformers 后端运行 OCR 和文档解析任务

items.title: The Open Agent Leaderboard
items.title_zh: 开放代理排行榜

items.title: Granite Embedding Multilingual R2: Open Apache 2.0 Multilingual Embeddings with 32K Context — Best Sub-100M Retrieval Quality
items.title_zh: Granite Embedding Multilingual R2：具有 32K 上下文的 Open Apache 2.0 多语言嵌入 — 最佳低于 100M 的检索质量

items.title: Unlocking asynchronicity in continuous batching
items.title_zh: 解锁连续批处理中的异步性

items.title: vLLM V0 to V1: Correctness Before Corrections in RL
items.title_zh: vLLM V0 到 V1：RL 修正前的正确性

items.title: Catch up on the Dialogues stage at Google I/O 2026.
items.summary: A recap of the 2026 I/O Dialogues, where leaders discuss the future of AI, quantum computing, robotics and creativity.
items.title_zh: 赶上 Google I/O 2026 的对话舞台。
items.summary_zh: 回顾 2026 年 I/O 对话，领导人讨论人工智能、量子计算、机器人和创造力的未来。

items.title: We’re announcing new community investments in Missouri.
items.summary: We’re helping build the state’s next-generation workforce and investing in energy programs.
items.title_zh: 我们宣布在密苏里州进行新的社区投资。
items.summary_zh: 我们正在帮助培养该州的下一代劳动力并投资能源项目。

items.title: 100 things we announced at I/O 2026
items.summary: This year at Google I/O 2026, we announced Gemini Omni, Google Antigravity, Universal Cart and so much more. Here are the highlights.
items.title_zh: 我们在 I/O 2026 上宣布的 100 件事
items.summary_zh: 今年，在 Google I/O 2026 上，我们发布了 Gemini Omni、Google Antigravity、Universal Cart 等等。以下是亮点。

items.title: A new experiment brings better group meetings to Google Beam
items.summary: See and hear your colleagues in true-to-life size and sound, making hybrid meetings feel more inclusive and connected.
items.title_zh: 一项新实验为 Google Beam 带来了更好的小组会议
items.summary_zh: 以逼真的尺寸和声音看到和听到同事的​​声音，使混合会议感觉更具包容性和联系。

items.title: I/O 2026
items.summary: At Google I/O 2026, we shared how we’re making AI more helpful for everyone. See everything we announced.
items.summary_zh: 在 Google I/O 2026 上，我们分享了如何让人工智能为每个人提供更多帮助。查看我们宣布的所有内容。

items.title: I/O 2026: Welcome to the agentic Gemini era
items.summary: The latest from Google I/O: See how we’re helping you get more done with Gemini.
items.title_zh: I/O 2026：欢迎来到充满活力的双子座时代
items.summary_zh: Google I/O 最新动态：了解我们如何帮助您利用 Gemini 完成更多工作。

items.title: A new era for AI Search
items.summary: We shared the next step in our journey to bring together the best of a search engine with the best of AI.
items.title_zh: 人工智能搜索的新时代
items.summary_zh: 我们分享了将搜索引擎的最佳功能与人工智能的最佳功能结合在一起的下一步。

items.title: Justin Solomon appointed associate dean of engineering education
items.summary: MIT faculty member in electrical engineering and computer science to focus on innovation in engineering education and new pedagogical approaches.
items.title_zh: 贾斯汀·所罗门被任命为工程教育副院长
items.summary_zh: 麻省理工学院电气工程和计算机科学教员，专注于工程教育和新教学方法的创新。

items.title: Two from MIT named 2026 Knight-Hennessy Scholars
items.summary: The prestigious fellowship funds graduate studies at Stanford University.
items.title_zh: 麻省理工学院的两名学生被评为 2026 年 Knight-Hennessy 学者
items.summary_zh: 这项享有盛誉的奖学金资助斯坦福大学的研究生学习。

items.title: Q&A: Expanding MIT’s global reach through Universal Learning
items.summary: Dimitris Bertsimas and Megan Mitchell discuss the motivation behind Universal Learning, and what sets the new MIT Open Learning educational initiative apart.
items.title_zh: 问答：通过通用学习扩大麻省理工学院的全球影响力
items.summary_zh: Dimitris Bertsimas 和 Megan Mitchell 讨论了通用学习背后的动机，以及麻省理工学院新的开放学习教育计划的与众不同之处。

items.title: Universal AI is “a pathway to AI fluency that’s accessible and approachable to anyone, anywhere”
items.summary: New AI education program from MIT Open Learning debuts with AI-powered personalization and a free introductory course for learners everywhere.
items.title_zh: 通用人工智能是“一条通向人工智能流畅之路，任何人、任何地方都可以使用、平易近人”
items.summary_zh: 麻省理工学院开放学习的新人工智能教育计划首次推出，为世界各地的学习者提供人工智能驱动的个性化和免费入门课程。

items.title: Study: Firms often use automation to control certain workers’ wages
items.summary: MIT economists found US companies tend to target employees earning a “wage premium,” which increases inequality but not necessarily productivity.
items.title_zh: 研究：公司经常使用自动化来控制某些工人的工资
items.summary_zh: 麻省理工学院的经济学家发现，美国公司倾向于以赚取“工资溢价”的员工为目标，这会增加不平等，但不一定会提高生产率。

items.title: Improving understanding with language
items.summary: MIT senior Olivia Honeycutt investigates how the ways we communicate can shape our views of the world.
